description_long: This is an adult pedestrian dressed in heavy winter attire, featuring a thick, fur-lined hooded parka and insulated pants. The parka has a prominent fur trim around the hood and cuffs, and the person is wearing gloves and sturdy winter boots. The face is mostly obscured by the hood and a scarf or mask, providing protection from cold weather. The clothing appears bulky and layered, suitable for harsh, snowy urban environments. The figure is in a dynamic walking or stepping pose, with one leg raised and arms slightly bent. The overall appearance suggests readiness for outdoor winter conditions, with all visible skin covered.
description: An adult in heavy winter clothing with a fur-lined hood, insulated pants, gloves, and boots, posed as if walking. The face is obscured, and the attire is suited for cold urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the fur-lined hood, scarf or mask covering the face, and the raised leg in a walking pose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hood, the arm extended backward, and the thick winter pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hood, the parka, and the overall bulkiness of the winter clothing.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the fur trim on the hood and cuffs, and the dynamic walking posture.
attribute_clothing_type: heavy winter parka with fur-lined hood, insulated pants, gloves, and scarf or mask
attribute_posture: walking with one leg raised and arms bent
